name: doubao-storyboard-video
description: Create review-safe graphite Doubao and Seedance storyboard packages, adult character references, light three-panel boards, and segment prompts from a finished script.

interface.shortDescription: Create review-safe graphite Doubao storyboard packs.
interface.longDescription: Split a finished short-drama script into generation-ready segments, create review-safe graphite cut frames and adult character references, compose light Chinese three-panel boards, and write aligned Doubao or Seedance prompts.
interface.defaultPrompt: Turn this finished short-drama script into a review-safe graphite Doubao storyboard production pack.
